check_script_lines: "\"Disk $($d.Number) [$($d.FriendlyName)] : Storage Spaces RAID device / State=$((@($vd.OperationalStatus) | Sort-Object -Unique) -join ',') / Health=$($vd.HealthStatus) / RaidDevices=$($pd.Count) / ActiveDevices=$(($pd | Where-Object {$_.OperationalStatus -eq 'OK'} | Measure-Object).Count) / WorkingDevices=$(($pd | Where-Object {$_.HealthStatus -eq 'Healthy'} | Measure-Object).Count) / FailedDevices=$(($pd | Where-Object {$_.OperationalStatus -ne 'OK' -or $_.HealthStatus -ne 'Healthy'} | Measure-Object).Count) / SpareDevices=$(try{(($vd | Get-StoragePool | Get-PhysicalDisk | Where-Object {$_.Usage -eq 'HotSpare'} | Measure-Object).Count)}catch{0})\" "
"} else { \"Disk $($d.Number) [$($d.FriendlyName)] : does not appear to be a Storage Spaces RAID device\" } }"
message='Windows 디스크 HA 점검을 수행할 수 없습니다.',
message='Windows 디스크 HA 점검 명령 실행에 실패했습니다.',
message='디스크 HA 점검 결과가 비어 있습니다.',
keyword for keyword in failure_keywords if keyword.lower() in text.lower()
message='디스크 HA 결과에서 실패 키워드가 확인되었습니다.',
lines = [line.strip() for line in text.splitlines() if line.strip()]
non_raid_marker = 'does not appear to be a Storage Spaces RAID device'
non_raid_lines = [line for line in lines if non_raid_marker in line]
raid_lines = [line for line in lines if raid_marker in line]
message='Windows 디스크 HA 점검에 실패했습니다. 현재 상태: Storage Spaces RAID 장치를 찾지 못했습니다.',
message='Storage Spaces RAID 상태 정보를 해석하지 못했습니다.',
if entry['active_devices'] != entry['raid_devices'] or entry['working_devices'] != entry['raid_devices']
message='일부 Storage Spaces RAID 상태가 정상(OK)이 아닙니다.',
message='일부 Storage Spaces RAID 헬스 상태가 Healthy가 아닙니다.',
message='활성 또는 정상 동작 디스크 수가 RAID 구성 디스크 수와 다릅니다.',
message='스페어 디스크가 없어 자동 복구 구성이 부족합니다.',
reasons='Storage Spaces RAID 상태, 헬스 상태, 활성 디스크 수가 모두 기준 범위 내입니다.',
f'Windows 디스크 HA 점검이 정상입니다. 현재 상태: '

results.message: Windows 디스크 HA 점검에 실패했습니다. 현재 상태: Storage Spaces RAID 장치를 찾지 못했습니다.
results.stdout: Disk 0 [SN530 SDBPNPZ-256G-1004] : does not appear to be a Storage Spaces RAID device
results.raw_output:
[점검 단계 1]
 - 실행 명령어: $OutputEncoding = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false); [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false); Get-Disk | ForEach-Object { $d=$_; $vd=Get-VirtualDisk -Disk $d -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($vd){ $pd=$vd | Get-PhysicalDisk -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Disk $($d.Number) [$($d.FriendlyName)] : Storage Spaces RAID device / State=$((@($vd.OperationalStatus) | Sort-Object -Unique) -join ',') / Health=$($vd.HealthStatus) / RaidDevices=$($pd.Count) / ActiveDevices=$(($pd | Where-Object {$_.OperationalStatus -eq 'OK'} | Measure-Object).Count) / WorkingDevices=$(($pd | Where-Object {$_.HealthStatus -eq 'Healthy'} | Measure-Object).Count) / FailedDevices=$(($pd | Where-Object {$_.OperationalStatus -ne 'OK' -or $_.HealthStatus -ne 'Healthy'} | Measure-Object).Count) / SpareDevices=$(try{(($vd | Get-StoragePool | Get-PhysicalDisk | Where-Object {$_.Usage -eq 'HotSpare'} | Measure-Object).Count)}catch{0})" } else { "Disk $($d.Number) [$($d.FriendlyName)] : does not appear to be a Storage Spaces RAID device" } }
 - 명령 종료코드: rc=0 (정상 종료)
 - 출력 내용: Disk 0 [SN530 SDBPNPZ-256G-1004] : does not appear to be a Storage Spaces RAID device
raw_output_lines: - 실행 명령어: $OutputEncoding = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false); [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false); Get-Disk | ForEach-Object { $d=$_; $vd=Get-VirtualDisk -Disk $d -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($vd){ $pd=$vd | Get-PhysicalDisk -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Disk $($d.Number) [$($d.FriendlyName)] : Storage Spaces RAID device / State=$((@($vd.OperationalStatus) | Sort-Object -Unique) -join ',') / Health=$($vd.HealthStatus) / RaidDevices=$($pd.Count) / ActiveDevices=$(($pd | Where-Object {$_.OperationalStatus -eq 'OK'} | Measure-Object).Count) / WorkingDevices=$(($pd | Where-Object {$_.HealthStatus -eq 'Healthy'} | Measure-Object).Count) / FailedDevices=$(($pd | Where-Object {$_.OperationalStatus -ne 'OK' -or $_.HealthStatus -ne 'Healthy'} | Measure-Object).Count) / SpareDevices=$(try{(($vd | Get-StoragePool | Get-PhysicalDisk | Where-Object {$_.Usage -eq 'HotSpare'} | Measure-Object).Count)}catch{0})" } else { "Disk $($d.Number) [$($d.FriendlyName)] : does not appear to be a Storage Spaces RAID device" } }
